projects.name: Mobile Application (Evolution & Modernization)
projects.summary: Refactoring and evolution of critical services under a decoupled, cloud-native architecture.
highlights: Implementation of a decoupled architecture integrating AWS (SQS, SNS) with PostgreSQL persistence.
Application of observability practices (structured logging, metrics, health checks).
Optimization of transfer services, biometric authentication, and key management.
Design of services for investment certificates and balance inquiries.

projects.name: Digital Onboarding & KYC
projects.summary: Automation of customer digital onboarding processes.
highlights: Implementation and enhancement of KYC services.
Development of digital onboarding workflows.

projects.name: Messaging & Integrations (MQ / ISO)
projects.summary: Modernization of integrations with legacy systems and external processors.
highlights: Migration and development of services over MQ messaging queues.
Integration with ISO 8583 messages for credit card processing.

projects.name: Payments & Automation
projects.summary: Automation of recurring payments and notification systems.
highlights: Implementation of batch processing and scheduled tasks.
Design of payment processing and query services.

projects.name: Error Handling & Whitelisting
projects.summary: Standardization and certification of error codes.
highlights: Normalization of error codes and handling of critical states.
Implementation of reporting and auditing mechanisms.

projects.name: Security Services & OTP
projects.summary: Implementation of authentication and validation mechanisms.
highlights: OTP generation and SMS notification services.
Deployment of APIs on IIS for critical workflows.

projects.name: Containerized Architecture
projects.summary: Adoption of cloud-native architecture using Kubernetes.
highlights: Deployment management with Docker and Helm.
CI/CD automation.

projects.name: Encryption Services
projects.summary: Implementation of security services and certificate management.
highlights: Development of decoupled services using .NET 8.
Key management and AES encryption.

projects.name: Core APIs & K8s Architecture
projects.summary: Exposure of backend services under a microservices architecture.
highlights: Development of scalable REST APIs.
Implementation of architectural patterns.

projects.name: ETL & Data Processing
projects.summary: Optimization of data processing and reporting workflows.
highlights: Design and implementation of ETL processes.
SQL query and stored procedure optimization.

projects.name: Legacy Systems Integration
projects.summary: Modernization and integration with legacy platforms.
highlights: Development of SOAP and REST services.
Implementation of API Gateways.
Application of idempotency and transaction control.

projects.name: Financial Transaction Processing
projects.summary: Implementation of business logic for payment and transaction processing.
highlights: Integration with ISO 8583 and financial systems.
Real-time transaction processing.

projects.name: Automation & Reporting
projects.summary: Automation of processes and report generation.
highlights: Implementation of batch and ETL processes.
PDF report generation and notification systems.
